summary: Added a normalized openPaperPositions pipeline built only from open paper trades returned by /api/trades.
Main positions cards and main open-count displays now derive from that same normalized openPaperPositions array.
Real live PnL remains computed from actual trade basis (qty * executed entry/current difference), never from shadow fixed-size estimates.
If current market price is unavailable for a real position, the card now labels it explicitly as 'Current (stale)'.
Shadow-only entries remain excluded from main cards and stay in diagnostics/background sections only.

report.normalized_source_used_for_main_cards: openPaperPositions = buildOpenPaperPositions(latestTrades, latestShadowData.recs), where latestTrades is sourced from /api/trades and filtered to real open paper trades only
report.source_used_for_kpis: Main open-position counts (pos-count, kpi-open, cmd-open) now derive from the same normalized openPaperPositions array
report.real_live_pnl_computation: For paper positions with qty, entry_px, and current_price: BUY_YES => (current_price - entry_px) * qty; BUY_NO => (entry_px - current_price) * qty
shadow_diagnostics_only: optional enrichment of real executed positions only

notes: No backend file change was required for this implementation step.
Scope remained limited to dashboard.html only.
